ApiPage.title: API Configuration - Atypica
ApiPage.description: Manage API keys and domain verification

CreatePage.title: Create Team
CreatePage.description: Create a new team to collaborate with your members.
CreatePage.note1: Teams start with 1 seat. You can add more after creation.
CreatePage.note2: Only individual users can create teams
CreatePage.note3: You will become the team owner after creation

ManageDetailPage.notFound: Team not found or you don't have access
ManageDetailPage.addMemberDescription: Invite a new member to your team.
ManageDetailPage.memberEmailPlaceholder: Enter the email of a registered user
ManageDetailPage.seatsFull: Team seats are full, cannot add more members

removeDialog.title: Confirm Member Removal
removeDialog.confirmMessage: Are you sure you want to remove member {memberName}?
removeDialog.note1: The member will no longer be able to access team resources
removeDialog.note2: Their historical data and records will be preserved
removeDialog.note3: A team seat will be freed up for a new member

ApiKeyCard.title: Team API Keys
ApiKeyCard.description: Programmatic access to your team's data.
ApiKeyCard.noKeyDescription: No API key generated yet. Generate one to access the Team API.

regenerateDialog.title: Regenerate API Key
regenerateDialog.description: Are you sure you want to regenerate this API key? The current key will be invalidated immediately. All applications using the old key will lose access.

revokeDialog.title: Revoke API Key
revokeDialog.description: Are you sure you want to revoke this API key? This action cannot be undone. All applications using this key will lose access immediately.

createTeam.forbidden: Only individual users can create teams

addMember.userNotExist: User with this email does not exist, please ensure the user is registered
addMember.notIndividualUser: Only individual users can be added as team members
addMember.alreadyMember: User is already a team member

removeMember.memberNotFound: Member not found or does not belong to this team
removeMember.ownerCannotBeRemoved: The team owner cannot be removed

generateSwitchToken.permissionDenied: Permission denied to switch to this identity

getTeamStatus.failed: Failed to get user team status

verifyDomain.recordNotFound: DNS TXT record not found. Please ensure you've added the verification record.
verifyDomain.dnsQueryFailed: Failed to query DNS records. Please try again later.

DomainVerificationCard.title: Email Domain Verification
DomainVerificationCard.description: Verify domain ownership to allow API user creation for specific email domains.
DomainVerificationCard.verificationInstructions: Add the following DNS TXT record to verify domain ownership:

removeDialog.title: Remove Domain
removeDialog.description: Are you sure you want to remove {domain}? Users with this domain will no longer be able to be created via API.
